15.reason: [The condition is incorrect: it checks only lower bound of left char and upper bound of right char, but doesn't ensure both chars are of the same type or that the left char is within its valid range. For example, 'a'-'Z' would incorrectly pass because 'a'>='a' and 'Z'<='Z', even though they're different types. Also missing parentheses around each type condition leads to wrong operator precedence.]
